text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Trump’s own followers on Truth Social started calling him the Antichrist after he posted an image of himself as Jesus, no wonder he deleted his devine delusion
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 特朗普在 Truth Social 上的追随者在他发布了一张自己扮演耶稣的图片后，开始称他为敌基督，难怪他删除了他那神圣的妄想

text: Trump: 34 Ships went through the Strait of Hormuz yesterday, which is by far the highest number since this foolish closure began.
text_zh: 特朗普：昨天有 34 艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，这是自这次愚蠢的封锁开始以来数量最多的一次。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump: 34 Ships went through the Strait of Hormuz yesterday, which is by far the highest number since this foolish closure began. President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普：昨天有 34 艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，这是自这次愚蠢的封锁开始以来数量最多的一次。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israel launched two airstrikes against the town of Sohmor, Beeka Valley. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对贝卡谷地的索莫尔镇发动了两次空袭。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli army radio noted a significant nuance in Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu’s remarks: The US demand is for no uranium enrichment in Iran “in the coming years, and that could be decades” – not a permanent ban. This suggests a sunset clause…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios : The United States demanded during weekend talks in Islamabad that Iran freeze uranium enrichment for 20 years. Iran countered with a shorter “single digit” period. The U.S. also asked Iran to remove all highly enriched uranium from the country; Tehran agreed to a “monitored process of down‑blending” instead. The nuclear issue was the main sticking point that prevented a deal. Pakistani, Egyptian and Turkish mediators are now trying to bridge the gaps before the ceasefire ends on 21 April. Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said an extension of 45‑60 days could be considered to allow negotiations to continue. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台指出了以色列总理内塔尼亚胡言论中的一个重要细微差别：美国的要求是伊朗在‘未来几年，可能是几十年内’不得进行铀浓缩——而不是永久禁止。这暗示了一个日落条款……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：美国在周末于伊斯兰堡举行的会谈中要求伊朗冻结铀浓缩 20 年。伊朗则反驳称应缩短至“个位数”年限。美国还要求伊朗从国内移除所有高浓缩铀；德黑兰则同意采取“受监控的降级处理过程”作为替代。核问题是阻碍达成协议的主要症结所在。巴基斯坦、埃及和土耳其的调解人目前正试图在 4 月 21 日停火结束前弥合分歧。土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹表示，可以考虑延长 45-60 天以使谈判得以继续。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 Netanyahu on Hungarian election results... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 内塔尼亚胡谈匈牙利选举结果…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: Russia has delivered a sharp warning to Israel over strikes near the Bushehr nuclear reactor in Iran, saying Israel is “playing with fire” and could lead to a “nuclear catastrophe." Moscow repeatedly protested after an Israeli strike landed close to Russian personnel, whose presence the IDF was "unaware of." Russia has since evacuated most of its staff from the Bushehr facility. A senior Kremlin official wrote to Jerusalem: “You are putting our people in danger. This is a dangerous game that could lead to a huge nuclear disaster with severe consequences for the entire Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 以色列第 12 频道：俄罗斯就以色列在伊朗布什尔核反应堆附近的袭击发出了严厉警告，称以色列是在“玩火”，可能导致“核灾难”。在一次以色列袭击落在俄罗斯人员附近后，莫斯科多次提出抗议，以色列国防军声称对此“并不知情”。此后，俄罗斯已从布什尔设施撤离了大部分工作人员。一位克里姆林宫高级官员致信耶路撒冷：“你们正在将我们的人民置于危险之中。这是一场危险的游戏，可能导致一场巨大的核灾难，并对整个中东产生严重后果。” @wfwitness

text: Benjamin Netanyau says the Trump administration reports to him DAILY. "I spoke yesterday with Vice President JD Vance. He called me from his plane on the way back from Washington. He reported to me in detail, as the people of this administration do every day, on the development of the negotiations." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡称特朗普政府每天都向他汇报。“我昨天与副总统 JD·万斯通了话。他是在从华盛顿返回的飞机上给我打的电话。他向我详细汇报了谈判的进展，正如这届政府的人每天所做的那样。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan: Senior IDF officials have briefed Israel’s ambassador to the United States, Yechiel Leiter, ahead of his meetings with Lebanese ambassador Nada Hamada Maoued in Washington. The unusual briefing was requested by the ambassador and approved by the chief of staff Eyal Zamir and defence minister Israel Katz. Military officials presented the deployment of forces in Lebanon, Israel’s security demands, and conveyed that Israel is acting "only against Hezbollah." They demanded that the Lebanese army act against Hezbollah in accordance with the Lebanese government’s own decision before a ceasefire can be considered. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：以色列国防军高级官员在以色列驻美大使耶希尔·莱特与黎巴嫩大使娜达·哈马达·马韦德在华盛顿会晤前，向其进行了简报。这次不同寻常的简报是由大使本人请求，并经参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔和国防部长以色列·卡茨批准的。军方官员介绍了在黎巴嫩的兵力部署、以色列的安全要求，并传达了以色列“仅针对真主党”采取行动的信息。他们要求黎巴嫩军队在考虑停火之前，按照黎巴嫩政府自己的决定对真主党采取行动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli Air Force said it targeted approximately 150 alleged Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon over the past day, including rocket launchers, drones, military buildings, anti‑tank launch sites and headquarters. The military also said it targeted groups that were planning attacks on Israeli troops. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列空军表示，过去一天在黎巴嫩南部袭击了约 150 个所谓的真主党目标，包括火箭发射器、无人机、军事建筑、反坦克发射点和指挥部。军方还表示，他们袭击了那些计划袭击以色列军队的团体。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 So... Yeah, the man has lost it 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 Trump deleted his "MAGA Jesus" post. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 所以……是的，这个人疯了 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 特朗普删除了他的“MAGA 耶稣”帖子。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth met with Indonesian Defence Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin at the Pentagon, where the two leaders agreed to elevate the bilateral defence relationship to a Major Defence Cooperation Partnership. The partnership focuses on military modernisation, training and professional military education, and exercises and operational cooperation. The two nations will explore co‑developing asymmetric capabilities in maritime, subsurface and autonomous systems, and will enhance joint special forces training. Indonesia was commended for its role in the Board of Peace and the International Stabilisation Force. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚国防部表示，尚未给予美国军用飞机进入其领空的最终批准。国防部发言人称，全面飞越许可文件尚未最终确定，且不具备法律约束力……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯在五角大楼会见了印尼国防部长沙弗里·沙姆苏丁，两位领导人同意将双边防务关系提升为主要防务合作伙伴关系。该伙伴关系侧重于军事现代化、训练和专业军事教育，以及演习和行动合作。两国将探索在海事、水下和自主系统方面共同开发非对称能力，并将加强联合特种部队训练。印尼在和平委员会和国际稳定部队中的作用受到赞扬。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 Chinese Defense Ministry: Chinese ships continue to move in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran, which we will respect and abide by. We expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz, and has opened it to us.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 中国国防部：中国船只继续进出霍尔木兹海峡水域。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议，我们将尊重并遵守这些协议。我们期望其他人不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，并已向我们开放。

text: Trump has deleted the post portraying himself as Jesus Christ. Know why? Because he forgot that the above figures in the sun are demons not angels
text_zh: 特朗普删除了那张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的帖子。知道为什么吗？因为他忘了太阳里的那些形象是恶魔而不是天使

text: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 Hungary’s incoming government says it won’t oppose an EU €90bn loan to Ukraine, but also won’t take part in the scheme, Magyar said. He added the issue can be discussed with future EU counterparts. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 匈牙利新政府表示，不会反对欧盟向乌克兰提供 900 亿欧元的贷款，但也不会参与该计划，马扎尔说。他补充说，这个问题可以与未来的欧盟同行讨论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump posts image portraying himself as Jesus Christ." Trump has deleted the post portraying himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普发布了一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。” 特朗普已经删除了那张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的帖子。

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 自称救世主的特朗普删除了他那神圣的妄想

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu expresses appreciation to Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán, calling him a “true friend of Israel” who supported the country during its war. He congratulates Peter Magyar on his election victory, wishing him success in leading Hungary while strengthening ties between the two nations. He says he looks forward to continued cooperation for the benefit of both peoples. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡向匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班表示感谢，称他是“以色列真正的朋友”，在战争期间支持该国。他祝贺彼得·马扎尔赢得选举，祝愿他在领导匈牙利的同时加强两国关系取得成功。他说，他期待继续合作，造福两国人民。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: I want to express my deep appreciation to my dear friend Viktor Orbán, a true friend of Israel, who stood firmly by Israel's side in the face of unjust international vilification. I congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory. I wish him success in leading Hungary forward, while strengthening the strong ties between our nations. I look forward to continuing our cooperation for the benefit of both our peoples.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我要向我亲爱的朋友维克托·欧尔班表达我深深的谢意，他是一位真正的以色列之友，在面对不公正的国际诋毁时，他坚定地站在以色列一边。我祝贺彼得·马扎尔赢得选举。我祝愿他在领导匈牙利前进的同时，加强我们两国之间的牢固关系。我期待继续我们的合作，造福我们两国人民。

text: OSINTtechnical NATO allies said on Monday they would not participate in Trump's plan to blockade the Strait of ​Hormuz -Reuters tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 北约盟国周一表示，他们不会参与特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡的计划 - 路透社推文

text: Open Source Intel UN: The World Health Organization has released $800,000 in emergency funding to support Iran’s health response. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043722420616327243/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 联合国：世界卫生组织已发放 80 万美元的紧急资金，以支持伊朗的卫生应对工作。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043722420616327243/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Sen. Tom Cotton warns any Iranian strike on Saudi or UAE ports would violate the ceasefire and trigger a U.S. military response. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043722204781683043/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 汤姆·科顿参议员警告称，任何伊朗对沙特或阿联酋港口的袭击都将违反停火协议，并引发美国的军事回应。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043722204781683043/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @azov_media : For the first time, the First Corps Azov of the National Guard of Ukraine and the 7th Rapid Response Corps of the Air Assault Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine conducted joint command post exercises with the support of the Security Assistance Group–Ukraine (SAG-U). The importance of these exercises is driven by the adjacency of the corps’ areas of responsibility on the front line. Accordingly, staff officers focused on synchronizing joint efforts and refining joint planning. "Your task is to make military decisions quickly and effectively," Brigadier General Yevhen Lasiychuk, commander of the 7th Corps of the Air Assault Forces, told officers during the training. In turn, the commander of the First Corps Azov of the National Guard of Ukraine, Brigadier General Denys Prokopenko, emphasized that the purpose of the exercises was to ensure coordination at the junction of the corps, building an integrated system of reconnaissance, fire engagement, and mining to prevent the enemy from breaking through the defensive line. The Commander of the Air Assault Forces, Major General Oleh Apostol, also addressed the officers: "Officers must be able to thoroughly analyze the situation and provide the commander with objective operational information. This enables sound decision-making on the battlefield." "Every three months, it is a different war. You must learn quickly, adapt, and remain flexible," said Major General Oleksandr Pivnenko, Commander of the National Guard of Ukraine, addressing the participants. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @azov_media：乌克兰国民警卫队亚速第一军团与乌克兰武装部队空降突击部队第 7 快速反应军团首次在乌克兰安全援助小组 (SAG-U) 的支持下进行了联合指挥所演习。这些演习的重要性源于各军团在前方责任区的相邻性。因此，参谋人员专注于同步联合行动并完善联合规划。“你们的任务是快速有效地做出军事决策，”空降突击部队第 7 军团指挥官叶夫根·拉西丘克准将在训练期间告诉军官们。反过来，乌克兰国民警卫队亚速第一军团指挥官丹尼斯·普罗科彭科准将强调，演习的目的是确保军团交界处的协调，建立一个综合的侦察、火力打击和布雷系统，以防止敌人突破防线。空降突击部队指挥官奥列格·阿波斯托尔少将也向军官们发表了讲话：“军官必须能够彻底分析局势，并向指挥官提供客观的作战信息。这有助于在战场上做出正确的决策。” “每三个月就是一场不同的战争。你们必须快速学习、适应并保持灵活性，”乌克兰国民警卫队指挥官亚历山大·皮夫年科少将在向参与者发表讲话时说。推文

text: Italian PM Meloni: Trump’s words on the pope are unacceptable.
text_zh: 意大利总理梅洛尼：特朗普关于教皇的言论是不可接受的。

text: Open Source Intel NEW: Bahrain shot down 7 drones over the past 24 hours. Via @mahdijasimg tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息：巴林在过去 24 小时内击落了 7 架无人机。通过 @mahdijasimg 推文

text: OSINTdefender Photos released by U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) showing flight deck operations on the USS Tripoli (LHA 7) in the Arabian Sea. Photos show F-35B Lighting IIs and MV-22 Osprey tilt rotor jets during night flight operations in the CENTCOM area of responsibility. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043721731328577615/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部 (CENTCOM) 发布照片，显示阿拉伯海“的黎波里”号 (LHA 7) 两栖攻击舰上的飞行甲板作业。照片显示 F-35B“闪电 II”战斗机和 MV-22“鱼鹰”倾转旋翼机在中央司令部责任区进行夜间飞行作业。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043721731328577615/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah asked children what they want to be when they grow up: "Join the resistance." "Destroy the tanks." "Become a sniper." "Stomp on the face of the Israelis." "Plant mines." @politicalpen_ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043721443259699680/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党问孩子们长大后想做什么：“加入抵抗运动。” “摧毁坦克。” “成为狙击手。” “践踏以色列人的脸。” “埋设地雷。” @politicalpen_ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043721443259699680/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: USS Tripoli (LHA-7) conducts night flight ops in the Arabian Sea. Designed without a well deck, it carries more F-35B Lightning II, MV-22s, and helicopters, with capacity to surge 20+ F-35Bs. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043721103311323615/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部：“的黎波里”号 (LHA-7) 在阿拉伯海进行夜间飞行作业。该舰设计时没有坞舱，因此可以搭载更多的 F-35B“闪电 II”、MV-22 和直升机，并具备增派 20 多架 F-35B 的能力。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043721103311323615/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel China enters the chat Chinese Defense Minister Admiral Dong Jun in a message to the Trump Admin and to the U.S. Navy: “Our ships are moving in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran. We will respect and honor those agreements and expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz and it is open for us.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中国加入对话 中国国防部长董军海军上将在给特朗普政府和美国海军的信息中表示：“我们的船只正在进出霍尔木兹海峡水域。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议。我们将尊重并遵守这些协议，并期望其他人不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，它对我们是开放的。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : NEW: USS USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) passed eastbound through the Strait of Gibraltar. Getting close to theater. @PeterFerrary https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043659727901512012/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613：最新消息：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰 (CVN-77) 向东通过直布罗陀海峡。正在接近战区。 @PeterFerrary https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043659727901512012/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command USS Tripoli (LHA 7) conducts night flight operations while sailing in the Arabian Sea. Tripoli is designed without a traditional well deck, which allows for more F-35B Lightning II stealth fighters, MV-22 Ospreys, helicopters, and extra maintenance space. During peak operations, the ship can surge to support up to 20+ F-35Bs. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 “的黎波里”号 (LHA 7) 在阿拉伯海航行时进行夜间飞行作业。的黎波里号在设计上没有传统的坞舱，这使得它可以搭载更多的 F-35B“闪电 II”隐身战斗机、MV-22“鱼鹰”、直升机和额外的维护空间。在高峰作业期间，该舰可增派支持多达 20 多架 F-35B。推文

text: Open Source Intel UK PM Keir Starmer: We call for Lebanon to be included urgently in the ceasefire. Hezbollah must disarm. But I'm equally clear: Israel's strikes are wrong. The bombing should stop now. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043719255766511810/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国首相基尔·斯塔默：我们呼吁黎巴嫩紧急加入停火协议。真主党必须解除武装。但我同样明确：以色列的袭击是错误的。轰炸现在应该停止。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043719255766511810/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @brianoflondon : Now it gets interesting. Chinese Defense Minister Admiral Dong Jun in a message to the Trump Admin and to the U.S. Navy: “Our ships are moving in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran. We will respect and honor those agreements and expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz and it is open for us.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel RT @brianoflondon：现在变得有趣了。中国国防部长董军海军上将在给特朗普政府和美国海军的信息中表示：“我们的船只正在进出霍尔木兹海峡水域。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议。我们将尊重并遵守这些协议，并期望其他人不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，它对我们是开放的。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Following the collapse of US‑Iran talks, the Israeli Chief of Staff has placed the Israeli military on immediate readiness for a return to war with Iran. The Intelligence Directorate is accelerating target building. No decision on military action…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 14: Israel is making preparations for an immediate renewal of the war with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 随着美伊谈判破裂，以色列参谋长已使以色列军队处于立即准备状态，以应对与伊朗重燃战火。情报局正在加速目标构建。尚未决定采取军事行动……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列第 14 频道：以色列正在为立即重燃与伊朗的战争做准备。 @wfwitness

text: Beirut today and everyday You can see the new unknown pod on the upper wing
text_zh: 贝鲁特今天和每一天 你可以看到上翼上的新未知吊舱

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Semi-official Tasnim News Agency has published a detailed analysis of the failed Islamabad talks, describing the U.S. delegation as “surrounded by unauthorised brokers” and lacking decision‑making authority. The Iranian team, led by parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, consisted of 71 carefully selected experts and was described as “cohesive, powerful and logical”. Talks lasted approximately 24 hours, moving into technical areas. The US delegation, by contrast, was reportedly chaotic, with 300 members and no internal coherence. Iranian negotiators said the U.S. approach resembled “real estate haggling” rather than principled diplomacy. Tehran concluded that Washington is in a deadlock on the battlefield and needs negotiations more than Iran does, and that the announced naval blockade is primarily psychological pressure. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 半官方的塔斯尼姆通讯社发表了一份关于伊斯兰堡谈判失败的详细分析，称美国代表团“被未经授权的经纪人包围”，且缺乏决策权。由议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫领导的伊朗团队由 71 名精心挑选的专家组成，被描述为“团结、强大且合乎逻辑”。谈判持续了大约 24 小时，进入了技术领域。相比之下，据报道美国代表团一片混乱，有 300 名成员，内部缺乏连贯性。伊朗谈判代表表示，美国的做法更像是“房地产讨价还价”，而不是原则性的外交。德黑兰得出的结论是，华盛顿在战场上陷入僵局，比伊朗更需要谈判，而宣布的海上封锁主要是心理压力。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu acknowledges that Trump administration reports to him 📰 Netanyahu at a cabinet meeting: "I spoke yesterday with Vice President J.D. Vance. He called me from his plane on his way back from Islamabad. He reported to me in detail, as this administration does every day."
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡承认特朗普政府向他汇报 📰 内塔尼亚胡在内阁会议上：“我昨天与副总统 J.D. 万斯通了话。他是在从伊斯兰堡返回的飞机上给我打的电话。他向我详细汇报了情况，正如这届政府每天所做的那样。”

text: China denies reports that it is sending or planning to send weapons to Iran: We oppose groundless smears or malicious associations without any factual basis. ✍️ Dw we know, you and Russia are spineless
text_zh: 中国否认有关其正在或计划向伊朗运送武器的报道：我们反对任何没有事实依据的毫无根据的抹黑或恶意联想。 ✍️ Dw 我们知道，你和俄罗斯都是没骨气的

text: Keir Starmer: We call for Lebanon to be included urgently in the ceasefire. Hezbollah must disarm. But I'm equally clear: Israel's strikes are wrong. The bombing should stop now.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：我们呼吁黎巴嫩紧急加入停火协议。真主党必须解除武装。但我同样明确：以色列的袭击是错误的。轰炸现在应该停止。

text: Keir Starmer: Impact of Iran’s behaviour in the Strait is causing untold economic damage. ✍ Good
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：伊朗在海峡的行为造成了无法估量的经济损失。 ✍ 好

text: If Lebanon stays under the same political system after the war, I will curse everyone who will accept that even if it's those who I support Almost 10,000 Lebanese casualties and the cunt decided to meet one Christian family and tell them he wants to investigate. Investigate what? Israel literally acknowledged attacking and failing over false intelligence
text_zh: 如果黎巴嫩在战后仍保持同样的政治体制，我会诅咒每一个接受这一点的人，即使是我支持的人。近 10,000 名黎巴嫩人伤亡，而那个混蛋决定见一个基督教家庭并告诉他们他想调查。调查什么？以色列实际上承认了攻击并因虚假情报而失败

text: 🎥 ON TODAY'S SHOW! Pepe Escobar: The ‘Second Coming’ at Hormuz — Trump Blocks the Blockade We welcome back the rockstar of geopolitics, Pepe Escobar, to break down what’s happening around Trump’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz—who really holds the cards, Trump’s “Second Coming” energy, and an economy under serious strain. Tune in! ➡️ 7PM CET - 8PM MSK - 1PM ET - 10AM PT ➡️ Watch on: YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🎥 今日节目！佩佩·埃斯科巴：霍尔木兹海峡的“第二次降临”——特朗普阻止封锁 我们欢迎地缘政治摇滚明星佩佩·埃斯科巴回归，剖析特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡周围发生的事情——谁真正掌握着主动权，特朗普的“第二次降临”能量，以及处于严重压力下的经济。敬请收看！ ➡️ 欧洲中部时间晚上 7 点 - 莫斯科时间晚上 8 点 - 美国东部时间下午 1 点 - 太平洋时间上午 10 点 ➡️ 观看平台：YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now officially underway. 🔸 15+ US warships in position 🔸 UK Maritime Trade Operations confirming restrictions on Iranian ports across the Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman and parts of the Arabian Sea 🔸 Trump threatening to destroy any Iranian fast-attack boats that approach: "using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea" Iran's response: no port in the Persian Gulf or Sea of Oman will be safe if Iranian ports are threatened. The IRGC Navy says any military vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz is a ceasefire violation. The ceasefire and the blockade are now running simultaneously. One of them will break first. WSJ. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁现已正式开始。 🔸 15 艘以上美国军舰就位 🔸 英国海上贸易行动证实对波斯湾、阿曼湾和阿拉伯海部分地区的伊朗港口实施限制 🔸 特朗普威胁要摧毁任何靠近的伊朗快速攻击艇：“使用我们打击海上毒贩的同一套杀戮系统” 伊朗的回应：如果伊朗港口受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会安全。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军表示，任何靠近霍尔木兹海峡的军舰都是违反停火协议的行为。停火和封锁现在同时进行。其中一个会先崩溃。华尔街日报。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
